---
title: "marsh areas"
format: docx
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
# Create a copy with the group variable added
sed_areas <- sed_thesis
sed_areas$DistGroup <- ifelse(sed_thesis$Dist %in% c(0.5, 2, 6), "Edge",
                         ifelse(sed_thesis$Dist %in% c(12, 18, 24), "Platform",
                         ifelse(sed_thesis$Dist == 48, "Upland", NA)))

sed_areas$DistGroup <- factor(sed_areas$DistGroup, 
                                 levels = c("Edge", "Platform", "Upland"))


```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(Rmisc)
library(rstatix)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(stringr)
#install.packages("readxl")
library(readxl)
#install.packages("lubridate")
#install.packages("lmerTest")
library(lmerTest)
#install.packages("ggeffects")
library(ggeffects)
#install.packages("scales")
library(scales)
#install.packages("ggh4x")
library(ggh4x)
#install.packages("patchwork")
#install.packages("cowplot")
#install.packages("rcartocolor")
library(rcartocolor)

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:/Users/savan/OneDrive - San Francisco State University/ProjectData/GitHub/DepositionSFB/data')
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).

```         
```

```{r}
# Reorder sites
sed_areas$Site <- factor(sed_areas$Site, levels = c("GiantMarsh", "SanPablo", "Buck'sLanding", "CorteMadera"))

# Plot
ggplot(sed_areas, aes(x = factor(DistGroup), y = Flux)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(preserve = "single")) +
  scale_ylog10() + 
  facet_grid(Site ~ ., scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    x = "Marsh Areas",
    y = "Total flux (g/m²/day)",
    title = "Sediment Flux Across Distances From Marsh Edge at Four Marshes for 6 Monthly Collections (July-November)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 78),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 64),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 80),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 88),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

ggsave("sed_marshareas2.png", 
       width = 60, 
       height = 40, 
       dpi = 300,
       limitsize = FALSE)
```

```{r}

# Plot
ggplot(sed_areas, aes(x = factor(DistGroup), y = Flux)) +
  geom_boxplot() + 
  scale_y_log10() + 
  facet_grid(Site ~ ., scales = "fixed") +
  annotation_logticks(sides = "1") +
  labs(
    x = "Marsh Areas",
    y = "Total flux (g/m²/day)",
    title = "Sediment Flux Across Distances From Marsh Edge at Four Marshes for 6 Monthly Collections (July-November)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 78),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 64),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 80),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 88),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

ggsave("sed_marshareas3.png", 
       width = 60, 
       height = 40, 
       dpi = 300,
       limitsize = FALSE)

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)  # install.packages("patchwork") if needed

sed_summary <- sed_areas %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Site, DistGroup) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = length(Flux),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(se_flux = sd_flux / sqrt(n))

# Plot 1: Boxplot faceted by site
p1 <- ggplot(sed_areas, aes(x = factor(DistGroup, levels = c("Edge", "Platform", "Upland")),
                             y = Flux)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DistGroup), outlier.shape = 16, outlier.size = 3) +
  scale_y_log10() + 
  facet_grid(Site ~ ., scales = "fixed") +
  annotation_logticks(sides = "1") +
  labs(
    x = "Marsh Area",
    y = "Sediment Flux (g/m²/day)",
    title = "A) Distribution of Flux by Marsh Area"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 70),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 64),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

# Plot 2: Line plot with SE ribbons on log scale
p2 <- ggplot(sed_summary, aes(x = factor(DistGroup, levels = c("Edge", "Platform", "Upland")),
                               y = mean_flux, 
                               colour = Site, 
                               group = Site,
                               fill = Site,          # move fill to main aes
                               ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,   # move ymin/ymax to main aes
                               ymax = mean_flux + se_flux)) +
  geom_ribbon(alpha = 0.15, colour = NA) +           # geom_ribbon now inherits everything
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "Marsh Area",
    y = "Mean Flux — log scale (g/m²/day)",
    title = "B) Distance Decay Across Sites"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 70),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 60),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 64),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

# Combine with patchwork
combined <- p1 + p2 +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Sediment Flux Across Distances From Marsh Edge at Four Marshes",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 78))
  )

combined

ggsave("sed_combined_panel.png",
       plot = combined,
       width = 80,
       height = 45,
       dpi = 300,
       limitsize = FALSE)
```

```{r}

sed_summary2 <- sed_areas %>%
  dplyr::group_by(marsh_edge_type, DistGroup) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = length(Flux),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(se_flux = sd_flux / sqrt(n))

# Plot 1: Boxplot faceted by site
p1 <- ggplot(sed_areas, aes(x = factor(DistGroup, levels = c("Edge", "Platform", "Upland")),
                             y = Flux)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DistGroup), outlier.shape = 16, outlier.size = 3) +
  scale_y_log10() + 
  facet_grid(marsh_edge_type ~ ., scales = "fixed") +
  annotation_logticks(sides = "1") +
  labs(
    x = "Marsh Area",
    y = "Sediment Flux (g/m²/day)",
    title = "A) Distribution of Flux by Marsh Area"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 70),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 64),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

# Plot 2: Line plot with SE ribbons on log scale
p2 <- ggplot(sed_summary2, aes(x = factor(DistGroup, levels = c("Edge", "Platform", "Upland")),
                               y = mean_flux, 
                               colour = marsh_edge_type,  
                               group = marsh_edge_type,
                               fill = marsh_edge_type,          # move fill to main aes
                               ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,   # move ymin/ymax to main aes
                               ymax = mean_flux + se_flux)) +
  geom_ribbon(alpha = 0.15, colour = NA) +           # geom_ribbon now inherits everything
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "Marsh Area",
    y = "Mean Flux — log scale (g/m²/day)",
    title = "B) Distance Decay Across Sites"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 70),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 60),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 64),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

# Combine with patchwork
combined <- p1 + p2 +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Sediment Flux Across Distances From Marsh Edge at Four Marshes",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 78))
  )

combined

ggsave("sed_combined_panel2.png",
       plot = combined,
       width = 80,
       height = 45,
       dpi = 300,
       limitsize = FALSE)
```

```{r}

sed_summary3 <- sed_areas %>%
  dplyr::group_by(marsh_orientation, DistGroup) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = length(Flux),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(se_flux = sd_flux / sqrt(n))

# Plot 1: Boxplot faceted by site
p1 <- ggplot(sed_areas, aes(x = factor(DistGroup, levels = c("Edge", "Platform", "Upland")),
                             y = Flux)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = DistGroup), outlier.shape = 16, outlier.size = 3) +
  scale_y_log10() + 
  facet_grid(marsh_orientation ~ ., scales = "fixed") +
  annotation_logticks(sides = "1") +
  labs(
    x = "Marsh Area",
    y = "Sediment Flux (g/m²/day)",
    title = "A) Distribution of Flux by Marsh Area"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 70),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 64),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

# Plot 2: Line plot with SE ribbons on log scale
p2 <- ggplot(sed_summary3, aes(x = factor(DistGroup, levels = c("Edge", "Platform", "Upland")),
                               y = mean_flux, 
                               colour = marsh_orientation, 
                               group = marsh_orientation,
                               fill = marsh_orientation,          # move fill to main aes
                               ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,   # move ymin/ymax to main aes
                               ymax = mean_flux + se_flux)) +
  geom_ribbon(alpha = 0.15, colour = NA) +           # geom_ribbon now inherits everything
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "Marsh Area",
    y = "Mean Flux — log scale (g/m²/day)",
    title = "B) Distance Decay Across Sites"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 64) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 70),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 60),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 64),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 60),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 60),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 60)
  )

# Combine with patchwork
combined <- p1 + p2 +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Sediment Flux Across Distances From Marsh Edge at Four Marshes",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 78))
  )

combined

ggsave("sed_combined_panel3.png",
       plot = combined,
       width = 80,
       height = 45,
       dpi = 300,
       limitsize = FALSE)
```

```{r}

library(lme4)

sed_areas_clean <- sed_areas %>% filter(Flux > 0)

marsh_area1 <- lmer(log(Flux)~ factor(DistGroup) + marsh_edge_type + Season + (1|Site), data = sed_areas_clean)
summary(marsh_area1)


# Null
m0 <- lmer(log(Flux) ~ 1 + (1|Site), data = sed_areas_clean)

# Spatial structure only
m1 <- lmer(log(Flux) ~ factor(DistGroup) + (1|Site), data = sed_areas_clean)

# Add edge type interaction
m2 <- lmer(log(Flux) ~ factor(DistGroup) * marsh_edge_type + (1|Site), data = sed_areas_clean)

# Full model
m3 <- lmer(log(Flux) ~ factor(DistGroup) * marsh_edge_type + Season + Study.Phase + (1|Site), 
           data = sed_areas_clean)

# Compare
AIC(m0, m1, m2, m3)
```
